arts.ttl: Lionel Messi all but rules out Barcelona return
arts.sum: Barcelona legend Lionel Messi has this week all but confirmed that he will not be heading back to the Camp Nou before his playing days are up. This comes amid…

arts.ttl: Lionel Messi Named 2 Barcelona Icons Who Had 'Greatest Impact' on His Career
arts.sum: Lionel Messi named two Barcelona icons as the biggest influences on his early career at the Nou Camp.

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick hails Barcelona star: ‘He’s training at a much higher level’
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick has on Friday moved to reveal his appreciation for the recent efforts of Ansu Fati. The name of wide-man Ansu of course took its place…

arts.ttl: Barcelona star could be left out for Dortmund 2nd leg
arts.sum: The coaching staff at La Liga giants Barcelona are giving consideration to extending the rest period of midfield star Dani Olmo over the course of the next week. That’s according…

arts.ttl: Barcelona: Osasuna lose appeal claiming Inigo Martinez was ineligible for rescheduled LaLiga clash
arts.sum: The defender’s participation in the rescheduled fixture had been questioned after withdrawing from Spain duty through injury

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick 'agrees' new Barcelona deal: How many trophies could the German lift this season?
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick reportedly agrees a contract extension with the Catalan giants until June 2027.

arts.ttl: Osasuna appeal over Barcelona player dismissed
arts.sum: Osasuna's appeal over Barcelona defender Inigo Martinez's eligibility to play in a La Liga against them is dismissed by Royal Spanish Football Federation.

arts.ttl: Watch: Barcelona players test returning Marc-André ter Stegen in training
arts.sum: Footage of Marc-André ter Stegen back in action in Barcelona training has on Friday come to the fore online. Shot-stopper Ter Stegen’s name has of course taken its place front…

arts.ttl: Liverpool handed transfer boost as Barcelona 'cool interest' in defender
arts.sum: Barcelona are reportedly out of the race for Bayer Leverkusen Jonathan Tah at this stage, handing a boost in the transfer market to Liverpool.

arts.ttl: ‘Not the type of coach to sign for 3 years’ – Hansi Flick speaks out on Barcelona future
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick has on Friday provided a fresh insight into his future with the club. The subject of Flick’s situation in Catalunya’s capital has proven a prominent…
